subcodes.first_line: O Afnan of the blessed divine Lote-Tree! Now that thou art beneath Mount Carmel in utmost gladness, serving at His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان سدره مبارکه الهیه الان که در ذیل جبل کرمل در کمال بشارت بخدمت آستان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Shrines and Holy places, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
